content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

August 14, 1990

George E. Galvan  
14825 El Camino Real  
Atascadero, CA 93422

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. I 90-437

Dear Mr. Galvan:

This is in response to your request for advice concerning certain activities of Robert Tapella in regards to election pamphlets mailed to voters in the June, 1990, election, and whether he violated the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹

Under Commission Regulation 18329(c)(4)(A) (copy enclosed), Commission staff may not provide advice regarding past conduct. This matter is more appropriately reviewed by the Commission's Enforcement Division. If you want to have our Enforcement Division review this matter, please complete the enclosed form and return it to:

Michael W. Sweet  
Chief, Enforcement Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Peggy Bernardy  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:PB:plh

¹ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
